_meta.note: Chamber groups & networks seed. Admins manage these in Admin → Groups. New groups are added; existing groups get a one-time leader/manager backfill only when they still have none (never overwrites admin edits). Leaders imported from Felicia's ConnectionCirclesGroupsLeaders.xlsx (2026-06-18).

groups.name: Home Improvement Professionals Network
groups.tagline: Leads, referrals, and insight for home-improvement pros.
groups.description: A credible group of home-improvement industry professionals sharing leads, referrals, and insight. From contractors and designers to inspectors and suppliers — if your business touches the home, this network keeps your pipeline warm and your reputation growing.

groups.name: Health & Wellness Resource Network
groups.tagline: Professional leads & referrals for health and wellness practitioners.
groups.description: Practitioners, providers, and wellness businesses across the West Valley meet to exchange professional leads and referrals — from medical and dental to fitness, nutrition, and senior care. Save the date: every 4th Monday. Coffee and tea served.

groups.name: Dynamic Business Networking (DBN)
groups.tagline: High-energy referral networking for growing businesses.
groups.description: DBN brings together motivated business owners and professionals for structured, high-energy networking — introductions, one-to-ones, and referrals that turn into real business.

groups.name: Lee's Luncheon Connection Circle
groups.tagline: A smaller circle, deeper connections — over lunch.
groups.description: A dedicated lunch group focused on really knowing each other's businesses, so every referral is a confident one. Limited seats keep the conversation personal.
groups.meetingSchedule: 2nd Wednesday of the month · Lunch 11:45 AM–1:00 PM

groups.name: Martin's Connection Circle
groups.tagline: Monday mornings with Martin — coffee, referrals, momentum.
groups.description: Start the week connected. A small group dedicated to learning more about each other so we can provide better referrals. Coffee and a small pastry provided at the Chamber offices.
groups.meetingSchedule: 1st Monday of the month · 8:00–9:00 AM · Chamber offices

groups.name: Young Professionals Network (YPN)
groups.tagline: The next generation of West Valley business leaders.
groups.description: YPN connects rising professionals across the West Valley for networking, mentorship, and community projects — build your circle early and grow with the Chamber.

groups.name: Event Planning & Hospitality Professionals Network
groups.tagline: For the people who make memorable events happen.
groups.description: Event planners, caterers, venues, rentals, and hospitality professionals across the West Valley meet to share referrals and collaborate on standout events.
groups.meetingSchedule: Last Friday of the month · 9:00 AM

groups.name: Community Clean Up Crew
groups.tagline: Chamber members giving back to the neighborhood.
groups.description: Members rolling up their sleeves for organized neighborhood clean-ups and beautification projects across the West Valley · Warner Center community.

groups.name: Valley Senior Resources Network
groups.tagline: Professionals serving older adults and their families.
groups.description: Senior care, health, legal, financial, and housing professionals connect to share referrals and better serve West Valley seniors and their families.

groups.name: Sustainable Professionals Network
groups.tagline: Businesses advancing sustainability in the West Valley.
groups.description: Solar, restoration, green services, and eco-minded professionals sharing ideas, referrals, and sustainable practices.

groups.name: Toastmasters
groups.tagline: Sharpen your public speaking and leadership.
groups.description: Build confidence in public speaking and leadership alongside fellow Chamber members in a supportive, structured Toastmasters setting.
